content: Fix notifications: remove import.meta.env.PROD guard in main.tsx
Fix feed sort: pin boosted posts to top by tier weight instead of re-sorting by created_at
Show boost badges in FeedScreen for user-purchased boosts (spotlight/premium tiers)
Priority carousel placement for spotlight/premium boosted posts
Gate analytics endpoint to premium/enterprise advertiser tier only
Load boosted posts on infinite scroll (not just first page)
